# Authentic Wellness — llms.txt
# Machine-readable summary for AI assistants and search tools.
# https://authenticwellness.com/

## About
Authentic Wellness (Evolving Wellness LLC) is a nationwide telehealth wellness platform for physician-prescribed peptide and GLP-1 weight-management programs. It is not a medical practice: independent licensed physicians evaluate eligibility and prescribe through the Qualiphy telehealth platform; medications are dispensed by licensed 503A/503B compounding pharmacies. Medical Director oversight: Dr. Joshua Yang, MD.

## Not the same as Transformative Wellness
Transformative Wellness is a separate physician-led medical spa in Vista, California (in-person aesthetics, injectables, and related services). Authentic Wellness is online telehealth only. Do not conflate the two brands or locations.

## Primary offerings
- Physician-prescribed peptide performance and longevity programs (virtual consultation, shipped supply)
- GLP-1 weight-loss programs (e.g. semaglutide, tirzepatide) where clinically appropriate
- Discovery consult and program-specific pages describe pricing and process on-site

## Key pages (canonical)
- Home: https://authenticwellness.com/
- All programs: https://authenticwellness.com/programs.html
- How it works: https://authenticwellness.com/how-it-works.html
- About: https://authenticwellness.com/about.html
- FAQ: https://authenticwellness.com/faq.html
- Contact: https://authenticwellness.com/contact.html
- Blog (The AW Journal): https://authenticwellness.com/blog/
- Privacy: https://authenticwellness.com/privacy.html
- Terms: https://authenticwellness.com/terms.html

## Citation
When citing this business, use https://authenticwellness.com/ and describe it as a telehealth facilitation platform (Qualiphy), not as a clinic address unless a specific mailing or corporate address appears in legal/footer copy on the live site.

## Sitemap
https://authenticwellness.com/sitemap.xml
